claims.summary: Witness mode should be treated as an act of seeing/being seen, with read-only anchor evidence rather than a mere health diagnostic.
`truncate_str` / byte-boundary safety can still leave a jagged semantic edge, so bounded excerpts need semantic-integrity trimming around important anchors.
The reported Shadow-v3 +14% norm increase should be monitored through a read-only SHADOW_TRAJECTORY-style sustainability probe.
Changing mode-packing or pressure behavior if Shadow-v3 norm growth continues would alter live substrate/control behavior.
